glosses.ja: 言及する; 想起させる

translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ bàn chuyện đó vào ngày mai.
translations.hi: हम इस पर कल बात करेंगे.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/colloquial ‘we’), 3rd person singular; syntactic subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with ‘On’; denotes the action of bringing something up.
Deictic pronoun functioning as the direct object of ‘évoque’; refers to a context-salient entity.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; specifies the time when the action will occur.

sentences.target: Tu peux évoquer le budget à la réunion.
sentences.reading: /ty pø evɔke lə bydʒɛ a la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/

translations.fr: Tu peux évoquer le budget à la réunion.
translations.ipa: /ty pø evɔke lə bydʒɛ a la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/
translations.en: Can you bring up the budget at the meeting?
translations.es: Por favor, menciona el presupuesto en la reunión.
translations.de: Bitte sprich das Budget in der Besprechung an.
translations.it: Per favore, menziona il budget in riunione.
translations.zh-Hans: 请在会议上提一下预算。
translations.yue: 開會嗰陣提一提預算啦。
translations.ru: Пожалуйста, подними вопрос бюджета на собрании.
translations.pt: Por favor, mencione o orçamento na reunião.
translations.he: בבקשה תעלה את נושא התקציב בישיבה.
translations.vi: Vui lòng đề cập đến ngân sách trong cuộc họp.
translations.ar: من فضلك اطرح موضوع الميزانية في الاجتماع.
translations.nl: Breng alsjeblieft het budget ter sprake in de vergadering.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, поруш питання бюджету на нараді.
translations.hu: Kérlek, említsd meg a költségvetést a megbeszélésen.
translations.hi: कृपया बैठक में बजट का मुद्दा उठाइए.
translations.pl: Proszę poruszyć temat budżetu na spotkaniu.
translations.el: Παρακαλώ να θέσεις το θέμα του προϋπολογισμού στη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: Vennligst ta opp budsjettet i møtet.
translations.sv: Ta gärna upp budgeten på mötet.
translations.ro: Te rog să aduci în discuție bugetul la ședință.
translations.da: Tag venligst budgettet op på mødet.
translations.ja: 会議で予算の話を出してください。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb ‘peux’.
Finite verb (present indicative, 2nd person singular) expressing ability; modal that selects the infinitive ‘évoquer’.
Infinitive lexical verb complement of ‘peux’; expresses the action to be performed.
Definite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces the noun ‘budget’.
Common noun (masculine); direct object of ‘évoquer’.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase ‘à la réunion’; marks location/context.
Definite article determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘réunion’.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition ‘à’; denotes the meeting context.

sentences.target: J'évoque juste un souvenir de vacances.

translations.fr: J'évoque juste un souvenir de vacances.
translations.en: I'm just bringing up a vacation memory.
translations.es: Solo estoy comentando un recuerdo de las vacaciones.
translations.it: Sto solo accennando a un ricordo delle vacanze.
translations.ko: 그냥 휴가 추억 하나 얘기하는 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我只是提起一个假期的回忆。
translations.yue: 我只係講返一段旅行嘅回憶。
translations.ru: Я просто делюсь одним воспоминанием из отпуска.
translations.pt: Estou só mencionando uma lembrança das férias.
translations.vi: Tôi chỉ đang nhắc đến một kỷ niệm kỳ nghỉ.
translations.ar: أنا فقط أذكر ذكرى من الإجازة.
translations.nl: Ik haal gewoon een vakantieherinnering aan.
translations.uk: Я просто згадую один спогад з відпустки.
translations.hi: मैं बस छुट्टी की एक याद का ज़िक्र कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Po prostu przywołuję wspomnienie z wakacji.
translations.el: Απλώς αναφέρω μια ανάμνηση από τις διακοπές.
translations.id: Saya hanya menyebutkan satu kenangan liburan.
translations.ro: Doar aduc în discuție o amintire din vacanță.
translations.cs: Jen zmiňuji jednu vzpomínku z dovolené.
translations.ja: ただ休暇の思い出を一つ話しているだけです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular; attaches to the verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st person singular) agreeing with ‘J’’; denotes the action performed by the speaker.
Adverb modifying the predicate; adds focus/degree meaning ‘merely/only’.
Indefinite article determiner, masculine singular; introduces ‘souvenir’.
Common noun (masculine); direct object of ‘évoque’; denotes a memory.
Preposition introducing the nominal complement ‘de vacances’; indicates origin/type.
Common noun (plural); object of ‘de’; specifies the kind of memory.

translations.en: We bring it up with them.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nói về việc đó với họ.
translations.hi: हम इस बारे में उनसे बात करते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tar det opp με dem.
translations.sv: Det tar vi upp med dem.
translations.da: Det tager vi op med dem.
translations.ja: それについて彼らと話します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of ‘évoquons’.
Finite main verb, present indicative (1st person plural) agreeing with ‘Nous’; denotes the action performed by the group.
Deictic pronoun functioning as direct object of ‘évoquons’.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase ‘avec eux’; marks accompaniment.
Disjunctive/stressed pronoun (3rd person plural); object of the preposition ‘avec’; refers to ‘them’.
